title: Sergeant Pickle Breath and the Rooftop Warriors
original_title: Sergeant Pickle Breath and the Rooftop Warriors
overview: A pot dealing man-baby is forced to find a new crib when his roommate/best friend threatens to destroy his teddy bear if he doesn't move out.
